The Pixel 10a shipped with a last gen processor. | Photo: Dominic Preston / The Verge

articles.title: ⚙️ How This Site Runs 100% Free Forever
articles.summary: This entire website costs $0/month to operate. GitHub Actions fetches RSS feeds every 4 hours, generates static HTML pages, and commits them back. GitHub Pages serves the files for free. No servers, no databases, no hosting fees. Just clever use of free tools!
